prompt: This is an OR gate. I wonder — will switch A be enough to make the fan spin?
Here's an OR gate. What do you think happens when you turn A on?
feedback: The fan spins! OR only needs one switch. Turn A off — does B work too?
It works with just A! Turn A off and try B instead.
Fan stops. Now try switch B.
B works too! OR turns on when either switch is on — A or B, it doesn't mind. That's the pattern!
Fan spins again! A works, B works — OR is happy with either. That's OR!
